summary: No input validation on any Tauri IPC commands. No schema enforcement.

read_file_as_base64.note: Accepts any absolute path from JS — no prefix check, no allowlist

read_file_as_text.note: Same — arbitrary file read from webview

write_file_as_text.note: Arbitrary file write — creates parent dirs too

append_line_to_file.note: Arbitrary append — O_APPEND but no path guard

send_signal.note: CRITICAL: no PID allowlist, any signal (incl. SIGKILL) to any PID

innerHTML_direct_injection: src/cards.js:225 — dialog.innerHTML (template literal with session data)
src/cards.js:275 — card.innerHTML (template literal with session data)
src/history.js:152 — card.innerHTML (template literal with message content)
src/events.js:145 — bubble.innerHTML (stream message — uses cached _html from DOMPurify)
frontend_validation.note: events.js:145 uses pre-sanitized _html. cards.js, history.js injections appear template-only (no LLM content) — low risk but unverified by schema.

coverage_estimate: ~5% (only markdown path sanitized; all IPC commands unvalidated)
